body: ### Breaking Changes - **AppSec:** Drop deprecated securityControls type [#8315](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8315) - **General:** Drop support for Node.js 18 and 20 in v6 [#9104](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9104) - **General:** Drop deprecated whitelist/blacklist plugin types from v6 surface [#8321](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8321) - **General:** Gate addLink(spanContext, attributes) legacy overload off in v6 [#8319](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8319) - **graphql:** Decouple resolver depth from path collapsing [#8774](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8774) - **LLM Observability:** Change span resource names to be consistent between openai v3 and v4 [#5638](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/5638) - **loader-hook:** Add include configuration for import-in-the-middle [#6455](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/6455) - v6.0.0-pre [#3919](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/3919) - **Test Optimization:** Change default test session name [#5409](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/5409) - **Test Optimization:** Default Nx and Lage names [#8268](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8268) - **Test Optimization:** Raise Cypress minimum version to 10.2.0 [#5397](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/5397) - **Test Optimization:** Raise Cypress minimum version to 12.0.0 [#8247](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8247) - **Test Optimization:** Raise Jest minimum version to 28.0.0 [#8246](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8246) - **Test Optimization:** Raise Mocha minimum version to 8.0.0 [#8245](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8245) - **Test Optimization:** Raise Playwright minimum version to 1.38.0 [#5596](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/5596) ### Features - **AppSec:** In App WAF support for lambda [#7783](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/7783) - **General:** [SVLS-9168] add aws.durable.operation_attempt tag to durable operation spans [#8595](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8595) - **OpenTelemetry:** OTLP trace metrics support [#8206](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8206) - **release:** Add breaking changes to release proposal [#9196](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9196) - **Test Optimization:** Add vitest no-worker init mode [#9173](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9173) ### Fixes - **AppSec:** Scope the mongodb nosql-analysis marker per query [#9076](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9076) - **aws-durable-execution-sdk-js:** Treat FAILED checkpoints as replays [#9160](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9160) - **datastreams:** Flush on write when flushInterval is 0 [#9120](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9120) - **General:** Wrap lazily defined fs.opendir on Node 20 [#9094](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9094) - **Test Optimization:** Handle missing beforeEach task result [#9129](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9129) - **Test Optimization:** Report typecheck tests [#9176](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9176) - **Test Optimization:** Route thread workers through main process [#9169](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9169) ### Performance - **General:** Load the GCP pubsub push plugin lazily [#9178](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9178) - **loader:** Match instrumented modules with a shouldInclude predicate [#9026](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9026) ### Documentation - **agents:** Clarify internal import ordering rule [#9172](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9172) - **v6:** Updated documentation for v6 [#9159](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9159) ### Internal (CI, Testing, Benchmarking) - **child_process:** Fix Bluebird flake that cascades to every later spec [#9078](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9078) - **child_process:** Load the mock agent once per suite [#9113](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9113) - **coverage:** Merge per-integration coverage in All Green before upload [#9086](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9086) - **Dependencies:** Bump bullmq [#9164](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9164) - **Dependencies:** Bump openai [#9122](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9122) - **Dependencies:** Bump the vendor-minor-and-patch-dependencies group across 1 directory with 2 updates [#9163](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9163) - **Dynamic Instrumentation:** Cover breakpoint error paths [#8996](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8996) - **engines:** Widen engines.node to >=18 in CI to keep Node 18/20 jobs running [#9145](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9145) - **General:** Derive supported config paths from canonical names [#9112](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9112) - **General:** Drop dead profile assert helper and fix telemetry typo [#7686](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/7686) - **General:** Introduce namespace field and start pruning internalPropertyName [#8943](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8943) - **General:** Key plugin version folders by single-digit major [#9052](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9052) - **General:** Widen GC pause p95 bound to deflake [#9121](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9121) - **graphql:** Migrate shimmer to orchestrion instrumentation [#7757](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/7757) - **kafkajs:** Drop retries:0 from header-disable producer tests [#9106](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9106) - **kafkajs:** Stop pinning the produce offset in the sendBatch test [#9074](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9074) - **LLM Observability:** Bump tested langchain versions with new cassette [#9135](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9135) - **LLM Observability:** Use DD_LLMOBS_ENABLED in tagger sampling fixtures [#9107](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9107) - **oracledb:** Bound connect and query timeouts in the ESM integration fixture [#9105](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9105) - Add runtime family tag on appsec lambda span [#9153](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9153) - feat(test optimization) Add Test Optimization HTTP cache reader [#8860](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8860) - **release:** Add v6 into release workflows [#9103](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9103) - **release:** Fix branch-diff Infinity crash on scientific notation SHAs [#9101](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9101) - **release:** Fix publish by dropping dist-tag add [#9100](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9100) - **scripts:** Disable V8 Maglev for Windows test children [#9131](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9131) - **Test Optimization:** Handle 5xx retry in getKnownTests error test [#9110](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9110) - **Test Optimization:** Prepare test metadata in main [#9171](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9171) - **Test Optimization:** Split main and worker instrumentation [#9170](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9170) ### Contributors [](https://github.com/BridgeAR) [](https://github.com/juan-fernandez) [](https://github.com/khanayan123) [](https://github.com/Mariovido) [](https://github.com/pabloerhard) [](https://github.com/rochdev) [](https://github.com/sabrenner) [SVLS-9168]: https://datadoghq.atlassian.net/browse/SVLS-9168?atlOrigin=eyJpIjoiNWRkNTljNzYxNjVmNDY3MDlhMDU5Y2ZhYzA5YTRkZjUiLCJwIjoiZ2l0aHViLWNvbS1KU1cifQ
